verification_report.summary: Sequential verification of the markdown proof found no critical errors and no gaps. The argument correctly proves the structural lemma on Z_{G_0}(X_0), reduces the orbit problem to the maps lambda_S = S^*|_K, and derives both orbit classifications from that reduction. No external-paper reference checks were required.
checked_items: Section 1: Two basic facts about X_0
Lemma on lifting isometries and moving nondegenerate subspaces
Section 2: Reduction from S to lambda_S
Section 3: The case dim E >= dim K
Section 4: The case dim K > dim E
external_reference_checks: No external paper references were used in the proof.
